parameters.subject: =CRM Dedup Alert - {{ $('Detect Duplicates').first().json.totalDuplicates }} duplicates found
parameters.message:
=

CRM Dedup Alert

Total records scanned: {{ $('Detect Duplicates').first().json.totalRecords }}

Duplicate groups found: {{ $('Detect Duplicates').first().json.duplicateGroupCount }}

Total duplicates merged: {{ $('Detect Duplicates').first().json.totalDuplicates }}

This exceeds the 20-duplicate threshold. Please review.

Run at {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') }} SAST

parameters.content:
## CRM-02: Nightly Dedup
Runs daily 01:00 SAST. Reads all unified records,
detects duplicates by email + fuzzy name/phone.
AI decides merge strategy, updates primary, marks dupes.
Alerts if > 20 duplicates found.
